nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 滩涂
nodes.summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: 北美黃林鶯
nodes.summary: 北美黃林鶯（Yellow warbler，学名 Setophaga petechia），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括滩涂，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、污染。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: thumb|upright|Female yellow warbler attending nestlings, [[Yukon Flats National Wildlife Refuge, Alaska, United States]] thumb|right|Male (above) and female yellow warblers foraging in a reedbed, Mill Creek Streamway Park, [[Kansas, United States]] American yellow warblers breed in most of North America from the tundra southwards, except for the far Southwest and the Gulf of Mexico coast. American yellow warblers winter to the south of their breeding range, from southern California to the Amazon region, Bolivia and Peru. The mangrove and golden warblers occur to the south of it, to the northern reaches of the Andes

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No significant negative effects of American yellow and mangrove warblers on humans have been recorded. Being generally common and occurring over a wide range, the yellow warbler is not considered a threatened species by the IUCN. Some local decline in numbers has been found in areas, mainly due to habitat destruction and pollution
